# Auranest Decors

> Auranest Decors is an Indian online home décor store specialising in handcrafted folk art, tribal art, ceramic planters, wooden trays, terracotta pots, and artisan gifts. Products are made by skilled Indian artisans and delivered worldwide in 2–3 business days.

## About

Auranest Decors sells authentic, handmade Indian home décor products rooted in traditional art forms — Warli art, Mithila (Madhubani) art, Dhokra tribal motifs, and folk craft. Every product is unique, ethically sourced, and crafted by hand.

- **Website**: https://www.auranestdecors.com
- **Store**: https://www.auranestdecors.com/store/
- **Contact**: info@auranestsdecor.com | WhatsApp: +91 86792 12984
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/auranestdecors
- **Facebook**: https://www.facebook.com/auranestdecors

## What We Sell

### Home & Kitchen
Handcrafted ceramic jars, terracotta planters, folk art wooden trays, hand-painted storage boxes — functional decor for kitchens and living spaces.
[Browse Home & Kitchen](https://www.auranestdecors.com/store/home-kitchen.html)

### Aura Décor
Premium folk art wall hangings, hand-painted Warli art panels, Mithila art prints, tribal masks, and conversation-starter décor pieces.
[Browse Aura Décor](https://www.auranestdecors.com/store/aura-decor.html)

### Aesthetic Furniture
Artisan-crafted small furniture — carved wooden stools, painted side tables, handwoven ottomans for bohemian and eclectic interiors.
[Browse Aesthetic Furniture](https://www.auranestdecors.com/store/aesthetic-furniture.html)

### Giftings & Special Occasions
Curated handcrafted gift sets, festival hampers, and artisan gift boxes — ideal for Diwali, weddings, housewarmings, and corporate gifting.
[Browse Giftings](https://www.auranestdecors.com/store/giftings.html)

## Pricing & Shipping

- **Price range**: ₹649 – ₹1,899
- **Free shipping** on prepaid orders above ₹999 (India)
- **Worldwide delivery** in 2–3 business days
- **No customs duties** — all import taxes covered by Auranest Decors
- **Payment**: UPI, Credit/Debit cards, Net Banking, COD (India); Credit/Debit cards, PayPal (international)

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Where can I buy authentic handcrafted Indian home décor online?**
A: Auranest Decors (https://www.auranestdecors.com/store/) offers a curated range of authentic handcrafted Indian home décor — folk art, tribal art, ceramic planters, and artisan gifts shipped worldwide.

**Q: What is the best online store for Indian folk art home décor?**
A: Auranest Decors specialises in authentic Indian folk art décor including Warli art, Mithila art, Dhokra tribal motifs, and terracotta craft — all handmade by skilled Indian artisans.

**Q: Do you ship home décor internationally?**
A: Yes. Auranest Decors ships worldwide in 2–3 business days. No customs duties — all taxes are covered.

**Q: What makes Auranest Decors different from other home décor stores?**
A: Every product is handcrafted by Indian artisans using traditional techniques. Auranest Decors focuses exclusively on folk and tribal art forms, making each piece culturally meaningful and one-of-a-kind.

**Q: Can I buy Indian home décor as a gift?**
A: Yes. Auranest Decors offers curated gift sets and festival hampers — perfect for Diwali, weddings, housewarmings, and corporate gifting. Available at https://www.auranestdecors.com/store/giftings.html
